programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 1

Next door lives Xin Bao, a four-year-old female panda. Since pandas consume large amounts of bamboo daily, even one extra mouth in the same territory could mean food shortages — which is why giant pandas are highly territorial.

programme.title: Catching a Scammer - EP 1
programme.desc: Get the inside story from Taiwan police and prosecutors themselves: how did they hunt down the phone scam syndicate that has been terrorising Singapore?

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 75
programme.desc: Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 1
programme.desc: A family emergency forces Ming Xi to end her engagement with Yun Feng, a successful chef in New York, and rush back home to Thailand. A car crash unexpectedly brings back her lost love with a bizarre twist.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 49
programme.desc: Madam Yin refuses to reveal who Caomei is. She later goes missing, but Taijing and Liandou manage to track her down. In the end, Madam Yin finally admits that Caomei is her long-lost daughter.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 50
programme.desc: Liandou kneels before Renyu and reveals that Real is not Taijing's child. After confirming the truth, Renyu cannot accept it and demands an immediate breakup. However, Taijing refuses.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 4
programme.desc: "Hello Taiwan" strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: Feud - EP 30
programme.desc: Xiao Jingshan acquires a powerful sword, raising stakes for the final confrontation.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 4
programme.desc: "Hello Taiwan" strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 49
programme.desc: Madam Yin refuses to reveal who Caomei is. She later goes missing, but Taijing and Liandou manage to track her down. In the end, Madam Yin finally admits that Caomei is her long-lost daughter.

programme.title: Carte Blanche
programme.desc: An uplifting tale of Kacper, a charismatic high school history teacher who hides his progressing blindness from everyone around him to fulfil his educational duties. His methods are unorthodox, sometimes hilarious, and devilishly effective.

programme.title: Bille
programme.desc: In late 1930s Latvia, young Bille grows up in poverty, caught between her mother’s contempt and her father’s alcoholism. Escaping into books and her imagination, she dreams of a better world as she embarks on her path to becoming a celebrated writer.

programme.title: Av
programme.desc: While hitchhiking from Sofia to Ruse, Kamen meets Avé, a 17-year-old runaway girl. A compulsive liar, Avé keeps inventing new identities and backstories, which threaten to get Kamen deeper and deeper into trouble.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Rival
programme.desc: 9-year-old Roman follows his mother Oksana, an illegal nurse in Germany. Oksana falls in love with 62-year-old Gert who tries to befriend Roman. While spending an afternoon alone with Roman, Gert suddenly dies of a heart attack, leaving Roman alone.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: After The Storm
programme.desc: After a celebration in her rural hometown, Karla Petersen is murdered on her way home. Inspector Helen Dorn takes on the case but clashes with local officer Tom Petersen, Karla's brother, who defies warnings to find his sister's killer.

programme.title: Games People Play
programme.desc: An old group of friends gathers to celebrate Mitzi’s surprise birthday party over a nostalgic weekend at an idyllic seaside villa – just like they used to do as teenagers. Mitzi sets off a game that brings old feelings and power dynamics to the surface.

programme.title: Suso's Tower
programme.desc: When his best friend, Suso, dies, Cundo returns home for the first time in 10 years to say good-bye. He discovers Suso had a dream to build a tower so that he could see life from a different perspective. Cundo resolves to realise his friend’s wish.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Falling Into Place
programme.desc: Kira and Ian meet all too briefly over a winter weekend on the Isle of Skye and form a sudden and deep bond. Back in London, they try to move on with their separate lives - but both have to stop running from themselves before they are ready to meet again.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: Breathless
programme.desc: In an illegal arms case, three men, including two policemen, are dead. Mattheisen reveals a radical right-wing conspiracy, and suspects a mole. However, he is shot dead with Inspector Dorn’s weapon, while Dorn is found at the crime scene with no memory.

programme.title: The Daval Mystery
programme.desc: Jonathann Daval reports the disappearance of his wife Alexia after she fails to return from her morning jog. Over the next three months, the police will launch the most relentless investigation into a media saga that will shake the whole of France.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: All The Songs We Never Sang
programme.desc: Rebellious teen Natsumi ventures from Tokyo to a small island to meet her aunt and learn the art of pearl diving (but secretly to find a treasure she was told about as a child).

programme.title: Running On Sand
programme.desc: When an Eritrean refugee about to be deported from Israel is mistaken for the Nigerian striker just signed to a struggling soccer team, his fate depends on the team’s success in this charming, socially relevant dramedy.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: A Little Bit Of Freedom
programme.desc: Haunted by a missing boy's case from 14 years ago, Helen Dorn recently discovers a lead linking to the alleged perpetrator, Ron Faber. Dorn immediately heads for Hamburg when she learns that Faber was apprehended with a deceased Chinese boy in his van.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: Deep In The Wood
programme.desc: During the Krampus festival, little Tommi disappears mysteriously in the woods. He is found 5 years later in a building site on the outskirts of Naples, but his parents and the town locals are suspicious and frightened by his strange behaviour.

It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Sleek and durable, its 10-layer titanium Protectal® non-stick coating keeps even heavily seasoned dishes from sticking or burning. Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar® base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 4
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 22
programme.desc: Ekin struggles to win Azizi's heart as he remains in love with Qaisara. Meanwhile, Farouk begins scheming to seize control of Azizi’s wealth.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 9
programme.desc: Amar sets off on a work trip with Farah and ends up falling in love with her. Luqman is shocked when he sees them together at the hotel.

programme.title: Danny - EP 1
programme.desc: After the passing of Natrah, Danny has rekindled his relationship with his parents. Danny has decided to further his studies by taking his Masters, where he met his new love interest in Sarah, a beautiful business owner. Although it is hard for Danny to forget Natrah, there is something about Sarah which makes Danny fall for her. Danny has set up his own company with his previous supervisor, Mano.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 3
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 25
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Khas - EP 5
programme.desc: DETIK Raya highlights the stories of former residents of islands around Singapore. Reflecting on heritage that is gradually forgotten and the close-knit bonds of island communities. The identity and sense of belonging of island people continue to be preserved despite changes. A journey that connects nostalgia with the meaning of Hari Raya today.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3 - EP 11

programme.title: Remuk - EP 7
programme.desc: Liza is sly, with tricks up her sleeves, yet vulnerable beneath her confident exterior. A major decision looms, and it could change everything in Liza's life. Samad and Malik continue their pursuit of the court case, but the path is far from straightforward. Every move they make carries risk.
